## Requested artifact
Describe the artifact needed.

## Governance problem
What operating or control issue does this solve?

## Proposed folder
Example: 03_data_quality_controls or 05_access_and_privacy

## Intended users
Who will use this?
- Data owner
- Data steward
- Analyst
- Manager
- Governance lead
- Executive

## Expected output
What should be created?
